items: Do not allow brake fluid to adhere to painted surfaces. If it does adhere, wash it off with water immediately.
To prevent brake fluid from leaking out, disconnected pipe joints should be plugged with a plug or the like.
Disassembled parts should be cleaned, and each port should be checked for ventilation by cleaning with compressed air, etc.
Disassembled parts should be kept free from dust and debris.
Each component should be assembled after making sure that it is free from dust and dirt.
Parts that are specified to be replaced must be replaced with new ones.
Do not use different brands of brake fluid to prevent chemical changes.
Genuine Honda Ultra Brake Fluid DOT3 or DOT4 must be used.
Do not reuse drained brake fluid.

blocks.text: Apply Nisseki Mitsubishi rubber grease to the mounting area of the dust cover before installing it on the piston and cylinder.
